allow: Bash(python -c "import tomllib; data=tomllib.load\(open\('pyproject.toml','rb'\)\); print\('name:', data['project']['name']\); print\('python:', data['project']['requires-python']\); print\('deps:', data['project']['dependencies']\)")
Bash(python -c "import gettext; t = gettext.translation\('tango_note', localedir='locales', languages=['ja']\); print\(repr\(t.gettext\('Hello'\)\)\); print\(repr\(t.gettext\('NonExistent'\)\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import gettext; t = gettext.translation\('tango_note', localedir='locales', languages=['ja']\); s = t.gettext\('Hello'\); print\('len:', len\(s\), 'bytes:', s.encode\('utf-8'\).hex\(\)\); print\('text:', s\)")

Bash(python -c "import zipfile, glob; w = glob.glob\('dist/*.whl'\)[0]; print\('wheel:', w\); z = zipfile.ZipFile\(w\); [print\(' ', n\) for n in sorted\(z.namelist\(\)\) if 'locale' in n.lower\(\) or n.endswith\('.py'\) or 'RECORD' in n]")

Bash(/tmp/tn-wheel-venv/Scripts/python -c "import tango_note, pathlib; p = pathlib.Path\(tango_note.__file__\).parent; print\('pkg:', p\); print\('locales exists in pkg:', \(p / 'locales'\).is_dir\(\)\); print\('mo exists:', \(p / 'locales/ja/LC_MESSAGES/tango_note.mo'\).is_file\(\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 /tmp/tn-wheel-venv/Scripts/python -c "from tango_note.core.i18n import setup_i18n; _ = setup_i18n\('ja'\); s = _\('Hello'\); print\('result:', s\); print\('bytes:', s.encode\('utf-8'\).hex\(\)\); print\('match:', s == 'こんにちは'\)")

Bash(python -c "import tango_note, pathlib; p = pathlib.Path\(tango_note.__file__\).parent; print\('pkg:', p\); print\('locales in pkg:', \(p / 'locales'\).is_dir\(\)\); print\('locales at repo root:', \(p.parent.parent / 'locales'\).is_dir\(\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "from tango_note.core.i18n import setup_i18n, _locate_localedir; print\('localedir:', _locate_localedir\(\)\); _ = setup_i18n\('ja'\); print\('Hello ->', _\('Hello'\)\); print\('NonExistent ->', _\('NonExistent'\)\); print\('Unknown lang \(xx\):', setup_i18n\('xx'\)\('Hello'\)\)")
